title: Investigate why beads Dolt changes are not auto-exporting to issues.jsonl
description: After creating or updating issues via bd commands, changes are going into the Dolt DB but not being automatically exported to .beads/issues.jsonl. This means git push doesn't sync the latest issues unless bd export is run manually first. Need to investigate why the auto-export/no-db sync isn't triggering — likely related to the no-db: true config setting or the git hooks not firing correctly.
close_reason: Investigated and resolved - removed old beads installation and reinstalled fresh

title: Investigate and fix Jupyter notebook and image linking flow for articles
description: The pipeline for taking Jupyter notebooks and associated images and linking them to their articles needs to be investigated and fixed. This hasn't been looked at yet but needs to be working.

title: Remove tags feature from articles list
description: Clean up the main articles list page by removing the tags feature. Tags are currently shown on articles but the filtering/tag functionality is not fully implemented and adds unnecessary complexity. Remove tag display and any related tag filtering UI from the articles list.

title: Write article: AI tools in my development workflow - Q1 2026
description:
Article covering the progression and experience of using AI tools in software development throughout Q1 2026.

Topics to cover:
- Claude Code as primary tool
- Gemini CLI usage
- Shift toward working more in the terminal
- Switching to Tabby as a new terminal emulator
- Increased use of tmux
- Running multiple Claude Code sessions in parallel
- Trying out Kintsugi
- Building a custom Claude Code radar app for observability
- Using VS Code mainly to look at data rather than write code
- Claude Code skills (prompting, context management, workflows)
- Context management strategies
- Getting started with Beads issue tracker
- Reading GasTown and other articles by Steve Yegge

More topics will likely be added when writing begins.
